behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names tracing.ts (playwright-core client), DisposableStub from './disposable', both types.d.ts files, docs/src/api class-tracing.md, and CLAUDE.md with 'Commit Convention' section and 'npm run flint' command.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what needs to change but doesn't show the exact code/line; agent must figure out how to wire DisposableStub and where to edit.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for 'Disposable' in return type and 'flint' in commit section, not specific variable names or code shape; alternative implementations would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run ESLint subprocess and parse .d.ts return type via regex; not pure string-literal matching.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require actual Disposable return type in .d.ts files and flint mention in CLAUDE.md; a stub wouldn't satisfy them.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Instruction requires the 'await using' pattern to work and groupEnd() called on disposal, but no test actually invokes tracing.group() or verifies dispose triggers groupEnd—only type signatures are checked.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are well-named with docstrings tagging [code_edit]/[config_edit] and clear behavior descriptions.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the module (tracing client) without citing exact line numbers; localization still required.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: CLAUDE.md diff adds a single line; docs add a single annotation line — localized.
